raw_text: I cancelled the order , and after that I am not getting cash on delivery. I don't use online payment. Rest is ok. I want blinkit to find and tell solution for it.

that one day I ordered some stuff. one article was not delivered and the delivery boy didnot inform. also the process of reimbursement is very difficult and lengthy. and they donot return in cash. they give u only coupons. fault is theirs but we have to suffer
I just downloaded your app because u r providing free ambulance service which is amazing..keep doing Good work. I just switched to your app because of this reason and I am truly loving your app.

Blinkit has started adding 30₹ extra as surge charges. Total extra is ₹9(packing)+₹12(Delivery)+₹30(Surge) = ₹51 + the tip we give to the delivery man. Be careful when ordering from Blinkit It is Daylight Robbery
I am giving 4 star because all things are best but the location I put in address it was on the delivery. Delivery boy shows me the location but it is 2 to 3 km away from my location
you did not send me the Nutmeg powder. I always have problems with missing items from my order n REALLY RESENT PAYING for items not received. Your packers are not very efficient. SHAME!!!
There are lot of apps that provides instant delivery but the best part about you guys are the free ambulance service that you give for the needful. GREAT WORK.

The delivery person did not have return cash. If a person does not have card/upi/ other electronic payment method. How do we pay if your person cannot give change. Remember cash is king. Many older generation prefer payment by cash. Kindly look into this.
The customer service is totally pathetic. There's no cancellation option from the customer's side if by chance the order is placed by mistake.

Excellent platform. always on time. special thanks to delivery persons. Everything is on this app. but one time i got very worst packaging of my life full or Mud And that's the thing Blinkit should focus on too. Thank You

Nice app. The ambulance arrived very quickly after I called. While waiting for the ambulance, they guided us on what precautions to take and how to care for the patient until they arrived. Great service."
Sometimes I'm waiting at the location but Blinkit is not assigning a delivery partner and it's showing 6mins since last 10mins to me.

My experience so bad, first of all, my item not received properly, and delivery partner making fraud , they are showing on application he is on my gate but he not And they said, abni milta order, and they cut the call i am already paid for the order in advance

after thousands of text on email or blinkit chat they didn't resolve my issue...i already shared video to blinkit...i already email them 4 time...the rider has stolen items and also sugar from 5 kg package by making a hole in it but they said items were carried by rider but rider were also very smart he didn't click photo when he was handling order to me...after thousands of explanation they didn't listen me...worst support system ever faced thank u so much for making my day worst
Really it is a last minute App. Coz it delivers goods maximum within 15 mins, which is impossible to go and bring goods within this period from nearby market.
there is no customer support . items quality is zero. send expired products to customers and there is no one to resolve the issues. below to poor.
I still haven't received my refund for the order that wasn't placed. such a useless and incompetent company. zepto and Swiggy are way better options than blinkit.

Since I began residing in a PG in Chandigarh, I have found it very convenient to purchase items online, and it has also saved me a considerable amount of time. The delivery services provided are excellent.

best app if you are in hurry you can do blinkit the prize are high but if we see the product or eat it worth so I love blinkit in summers we should not go out of are house the dilevery boy came and gave the dilevery it's the best thing and it not take much time to come at your home thank you blinkit

as we are making huge order but then also u all chrgs handling fees it's not worthy...if u skip yhis thing thn blinkit is gud..bcoz we don't het aby discount in any product and u add again extra handling fees..try to rectify this asap..
